TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mamo^tepay_a_tafedo_no_pinalengaw, title = Mamo^tepay_a_tafedo_no_pinalengaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mamo^tepay_a_tafedo_no_pinalengaw} }

S.FORM: Mamo^tepay a tafedo no pinalengaw O nikaenan no'Amis a dateng to sarariday masowalay no 'alomanay i, "mamo^tapay a faloco' a dateng" hananay ko ngangan i sowal no Kowaping . Ira ko dongec no 'oway , talacay , naliti', lengac , 'icep , cangrad, tefos , tiy-so, 'afinong, hay-caw. "Faloco'" hananay i, oya tafedo no pinalengaw . Ona mamo^pay a tafedo' no pinalengaw i, o dongec ato naliti' ko saadihayay a malo hakakaenen , hasakadademak no tamdaw ko lengaw naira. Makari'ang to ko ka'oripan nopinalengaw, awaay to ko lengaw no hay-caw, saka cowa to kakomaen ko 'Amis to tafedo no hay-caw. Pi'arawan to lakaw .
S.PHON: mamo~uʔtəpaj a tafəɬ~ɮo~u no~u pinaɾəŋaw o~u nikaənan no~uʡamis a ɬ~ɮatəŋ to~u sarariɬ~ɮaj maso~uwaɾaj no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i, "mamo~uʔtapaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a ɬ~ɮatəŋ" ħananaj ko~u ŋaŋan i so~uwaɾ no~u ko~uwapiŋ . ira ko~u ɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ no~u ʡo~uwaj , taɾaʦaj , naɾitiʡ, ɾəŋaʦ , ʡiʦəp , ʦaŋraɬ~ɮ, təfo~us , tij-so~u, ʡafino~uŋ, ħaj-ʦaw. "faɾo~uʦo~uʡ" ħananaj i, o~uja tafəɬ~ɮo~u no~u pinaɾəŋaw . o~una mamo~uʔpaj a tafəɬ~ɮo~uʡ no~u pinaɾəŋaw i, o~u ɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ ato~u naɾitiʡ ko~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj a maɾo~u ħakakaənən , ħasakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ɾəŋaw naira. makariʡaŋ to~u ko~u kaʡo~uripan no~upinaɾəŋaw, awaaj to~u ko~u ɾəŋaw no~u ħaj-ʦaw, saka ʦo~uwa to~u kako~umaən ko~u ʡamis to~u tafəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ħaj-ʦaw. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw .
S.FORM: Mamo^tepay a tafedo no pinalengaw O nikaenan no'Amis a dateng to sarariday masowalay no 'alomanay i, "mamo^tapay a faloco' a dateng" hananay ko ngangan i sowal no Kowaping . Ira ko dongec no 'oway , talacay , naliti', lengac , 'icep , cangrad, tefos , tiy-so, 'afinong, hay-caw. "Faloco'" hananay i, oya tafedo no pinalengaw . Ona mamo^pay a tafedo' no pinalengaw i, o dongec ato naliti' ko saadihayay a malo hakakaenen , hasakadademak no tamdaw ko lengaw naira. Makari'ang to ko ka'oripan nopinalengaw, awaay to ko lengaw no hay-caw, saka cowa to kakomaen ko 'Amis to tafedo no hay-caw. Pi'arawan to lakaw .
S.PHON: mamo~uʔtəpaj a tafəɬ~ɮo~u no~u pinaɾəŋaw o~u nikaənan no~uʡamis a ɬ~ɮatəŋ to~u sarariɬ~ɮaj maso~uwaɾaj no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i, "mamo~uʔtapaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a ɬ~ɮatəŋ" ħananaj ko~u ŋaŋan i so~uwaɾ no~u ko~uwapiŋ . ira ko~u ɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ no~u ʡo~uwaj , taɾaʦaj , naɾitiʡ, ɾəŋaʦ , ʡiʦəp , ʦaŋraɬ~ɮ, təfo~us , tij-so~u, ʡafino~uŋ, ħaj-ʦaw. "faɾo~uʦo~uʡ" ħananaj i, o~uja tafəɬ~ɮo~u no~u pinaɾəŋaw . o~una mamo~uʔpaj a tafəɬ~ɮo~uʡ no~u pinaɾəŋaw i, o~u ɬ~ɮo~uŋəʦ ato~u naɾitiʡ ko~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj a maɾo~u ħakakaənən , ħasakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ɾəŋaw naira. makariʡaŋ to~u ko~u kaʡo~uripan no~upinaɾəŋaw, awaaj to~u ko~u ɾəŋaw no~u ħaj-ʦaw, saka ʦo~uwa to~u kako~umaən ko~u ʡamis to~u tafəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ħaj-ʦaw. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw .
